headings: (c) All of that property located at 789 Some Street, Bryan, TX 77801
text: - (c) The Subcontractor shall properly classify all workers on the Project as employees and not as Independent Contractors and shall treat them accordingly for purposes of Workers' Compensation insurance coverage, employee tax withholdings, employer payroll taxes and wage and hour laws and all Subcontractors shall pay all employees on the Project by check, making all withholdings and payments required by state and federal law and immediately provide a record of such payments and withholdings to the Contractor on request.
